title: AN ACT INCREASING THE BED CAPACITY OF THE BALINGASAG MEDICARE COMMUNITY HOSPITAL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF BALINGASAG, PROVINCE OF MISAMIS ORIENTAL, FROM FIFTEEN (15) TO TWENTY-FIVE (25) BEDS, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

chunks.text:
H. NO. 302 / 88 OG No. 20, 2930 (May 18, 1992)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7327, March 31, 1992 ]

AN ACT INCREASING THE BED CAPACITY OF THE BALINGASAG MEDICARE COMMUNITY HOSPITAL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF BALINGASAG, PROVINCE OF MISAMIS ORIENTAL, FROM FIFTEEN (15) TO TWENTY-FIVE (25) BEDS, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The bed capacity of the Balingasag Medicare Community Hospital in the Municipality of Balingasag, Province of Misamis Oriental, is hereby increased from fifteen (15) to twenty-five (25) beds.

SEC. 2. The amount necessary to carry out the provisions of this Act shall be charged against the lump-sum appropriations authorized for the purpose under the current General Appropriations Act. Thereafter, such sums as may be necessary for the operation and maintenance of the hospital shall be included in the annual General Appropriations Act.

SEC. 3. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved,

(Sgd.) NEPTALI A. GONZALES

(Sgd.)

RAMON V. MITRA

President of the Senate

Speaker of the House of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was finally passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on February 3, 1992 and January 23, 1992, respectively.

(Sgd.)

ANACLETO D. BADOY, JR.

(Sgd.)

CAMILO L. SABIO

Secretary of the Senate

Secretary General House of Representatives

Approved: March 31, 1992

(Sgd.)

CORAZON C. AQUINO

President of the Philippines
